title: hieracium sparsum subsp. kiderense
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. kiderense, commonly known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. kiderense include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
